name: NYC Street Gang RP
description:
The NYC Street Gang RP.

Street gang

As members, you'll take on the role of a gang member and be given realistic scenarios to act out. You can become a normal civilian or become a Gang member, you also can become a drill rapper.

In rapping you can diss your opps members, and dead members

There are 4 rival gangs, OY, DOA, YGZ, OGZ
creator: Kira Shoku
